title: AN ACT NAMING THE ROAD FROM BARANGAY BAGATANGKI, MUNICIPALITY OF MALINAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY TO BARANGAY SAN RAMON, CITY OF IRIGA, UP TO BARANGAY ANAWAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF OCAMPO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AS THE GOV. FELIX O. ALFELOR SR. NATIONAL HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 5298; 105 OG No. 40, 5990 (October 5, 2009)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9686, August 04, 2009 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE ROAD FROM BARANGAY BAGATANGKI, MUNICIPALITY OF MALINAO, PROVINCE OF ALBAY TO BARANGAY SAN RAMON, CITY OF IRIGA, UP TO BARANGAY ANAWAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF OCAMPO, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AS THE GOV. FELIX O. ALFELOR SR. NATIONAL HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The road which stretches from Barangay Bagatangki in the Municipality of Malinao, Province of Albay to Barangay Macaangay and passes through barangays Poblacion and Burocbusoc in the Municipality of Buhi to Barangay San Ramon, City of Iriga and ends at Barangay Anawan in the Municipality of Ocampo, Province of Camarines Sur is hereby named as the Gov. Felix O. Alfelor Sr. National Highway.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 17, 2008 and May 25, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 04 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
